title: The Last Cartographer of Veil
description: The empire of Veil is unmaking itself one province at a time — not conquered, but forgotten, erased from every map and memory as though it never was. Mira Anselt is the last cartographer who can still see the vanished lands, and her maps are the only proof they existed. When the erasure reaches the capital, she must decide what is worth remembering. An epic high fantasy of memory, empire, and the cost of being the one who recalls.
